title: Asking Questions in Class 课堂提问
scene: 英语课上，学生举手向老师提问。

lines.en: OK, class. Does anyone have any questions about this lesson?
lines.zh: 好了，同学们。关于这节课，有人有问题吗？

lines.en: Mr. Wang, I have a question.
What is the difference between "look at" and "see"?
That's a very good question! Let me explain.
lines.zh: 这是一个很好的问题！让我来解释。

lines.en: "Look at" means you are trying to see something. "See" means it just happens.
lines.zh: "look at"表示你努力去看某物。"see"表示自然而然地看到。

lines.en: So "look at the blackboard" means we try to see it?
lines.zh: 所以"look at the blackboard"是我们努力去看黑板？

lines.en: Exactly! You are a smart student, Kevin.
lines.zh: 完全正确！你真是个聪明的学生，凯文。

lines.en: Thank you, Mr. Wang! I understand now.
lines.zh: 谢谢您，王老师！我现在明白了。

lines.en: Any other questions? No? OK, let's continue.
lines.zh: 还有其他问题吗？没有？好的，我们继续。
